final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire [4:0] input_voltage,  
    output reg [4:0] output_voltage  
);  

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
    if (enable) begin  
        output_voltage <= input_voltage << 1; // Multiply input voltage by 2  
    end else begin  
        output_voltage <= 5'b00000; // Set output to 0V when not enabled  
    end  
end  
endmodule
